news.title:
BHEL gets five-year extension to procure 21 items from land border countries.
This ensures extended cross-border sourcing arrangements and supply continuity ahead.
news.summary:
BHEL gets five-year extension to procure 21 items from land border countries.

news.title:
India Ratings revised Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd's (BHEL) outlook from 'Stable' to 'Positive'.
The long-term rating was reaffirmed at IND AA, with Rs 80,000 Cr loans rated.
news.summary:

news.title:
Sulphur shortage from West Asia war threatens Bhel's boiler production.
Hormuz blockade impacts Bhel as its boiler order book remains full.

news.title:

The order reflects fresh demand in BHEL's core power engineering sector.

news.title:
BHEL secures a Rs. 13,500 Cr. NOA from NTPC for 3x800 MW Telangana Stage II STPP.
The project includes design, supply, and commissioning, with completion slated in 62 months.
news.summary:

news.title:
India eases restrictions for Bharat Heavy Electricals, SAIL to procure Chinese equipment.
Relaxation follows equipment shortages and delays after 2020 border clash restrictions.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.

news.title:
BHEL rose 5% to ₹264.75, Tata Power hit ₹418.4 (52-wk high) amid strong power sector investments.
Govt's ₹200T investment plan for power boosts renewable integration, distribution reforms, and nuclear opportunities.
news.summary:
BHEL rose 5% to ₹264.75, Tata Power hit ₹418.4 (52-wk high) amid strong power sector investments.
Govt's ₹200T investment plan for power boosts renewable integration, distribution reforms, and nuclear opportunities.

news.title:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.
news.summary:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.

Glenmark Pharma attracts attention with ongoing interest in the pharmaceutical sector.

news.title:
BHEL to invest Rs 3,064.5 crore in Coal India JV for coal-to-chemicals; JV to develop 2,000 TPD Ammonium Nitrate plant.
BHEL also forms JV with Titagarh Rail for Vande Bharat train maintenance; Q3 net profit triples to Rs 390.4 crore.
news.summary:
BHEL to invest Rs 3,064.5 crore in Coal India JV for coal-to-chemicals; JV to develop 2,000 TPD Ammonium Nitrate plant.
BHEL also forms JV with Titagarh Rail for Vande Bharat train maintenance; Q3 net profit triples to Rs 390.4 crore.

news.title:

news.title:
Commercial Court orders attachment of ₹55.8 Cr from Bharat Heavy Electricals' account following a petition by Indwell Construction.
The company is reviewing the order and exploring legal options; financial impact details not disclosed yet.
